text: Computer vision is a field of artificial intelligence that enables computers to understand and interpret visual information from the world, such as photos and videos. Two important tasks in computer vision are image recognition and object detection. Image recognition allows a computer to identify what is in a picture, like recognizing a cat or a dog. Object detection goes a step further by not only identifying objects but also locating them within an image. These technologies have many practical applications. For example, in self-driving cars, computer vision helps the vehicle detect road signs, pedestrians, and other cars to drive safely. It is also used in medical imaging, security systems, and smartphone cameras.
